zh.lifeSummary: Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg是Heinrich Burwin (I.) von Mecklenburg和Adelaide的兒子，於大約1170年出生在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 梅可倫波-史維林斯塔特 史維林。他於大約1200年與Kristina Sverkersdotter結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1226年6月5日在德國福萊斯塔阿特 梅可倫波-史維林斯塔特 居斯特洛福享年57歲，埋葬在德國福萊斯塔阿特 梅可倫波-史維林斯塔特 多朗。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg是Heinrich Burwin (I.) von Mecklenburg和Adelaide的儿子，于大约1170年出生在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 梅可倫波-史維林斯塔特 史維林。他于大约1200年与Kristina Sverkersdotter结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1226年6月5日在德国福萊斯塔阿特 梅可倫波-史維林斯塔特 居斯特洛福享年57岁，埋葬在德国福萊斯塔阿特 梅可倫波-史維林斯塔特 多朗。

nameMeanings.name: Burwin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: nickname or metonymic occupational name derived from medieval Latin burdinus ‘mule, hinny’ or, alternatively, from Occitan burdir ‘to sport or amuse oneself’.

French: possibly also a derivative of Old French borde ‘smallholding’ (from Frankish bord ‘plank’), used as a designation for a tenant farmer, or of Old French bo(u)rde ‘lie’, used as a nickname for a liar.

variants.name: Burden
meanings: (southern England, of Norman origin): from a diminutive of the ancient Germanic personal name Burdo, for which compare Burdett . Burdonus and other derivatives of the Gaulish personal name Burdo (‘mule’) are found in France, where it is rare and the similar French surname may derive instead from Old French bourdon in the sense ‘pilgrim's staff’ (compare Bourdon 1). The personal name, whether of ancient Germanic or Gaulish origin, does occur in medieval England, but rarely.

habitational name from any of various places called Burdon or Burden. Burden in Yorkshire and Great Burdon in County Durham are named with Old English burh ‘stronghold, fortified place’ + dūn ‘hill’; Burdon in Tyne and Wear is named with Old English b̄re ‘byre’ + denu ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg was born about 1170, in Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Schwerin as the son of Heinrich Burwin (I.) von Mecklenburg and Adelaide. He married Kristina Sverkersdotter about 1200. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 5 June 1226, in Güstrow, Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Germany, at the age of 57, and was buried in Doberan, Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg est né environ 1170, à Stadt Schwerin, Großherzogtum Mecklenburg-Schwerin, fils de Heinrich Burwin (I.) von Mecklenburg et Adelaide. Il a épousé Kristina Sverkersdotter environ 1200. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 5 juin 1226, à Stadt Güstrow, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Allemagne, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Stadt Doberan, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg wurde um 1170 in Stadt Schwerin, Großherzogtum Mecklenburg-Schwerin, als Sohn von Heinrich Burwin (I.) von Mecklenburg und Adelaide geboren. Er hat um 1200 Kristina Sverkersdotter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 5. Juni 1226 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Stadt Güstrow, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Deutschland und wurde in Stadt Doberan, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg è nato il circa 1170 nel Stadt Schwerin, Großherzogtum Mecklenburg-Schwerin come figlio di Heinrich Burwin (I.) von Mecklenburg e Adelaide. Lui sposato Kristina Sverkersdotter circa 1200. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 5 giugno 1226, nel Stadt Güstrow, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Germania, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Stadt Doberan, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburgは約1170年にグロssハーゾグトゥム メックレンブルグ-スチウエリンスタト スチウエリンでHeinrich Burwin (I.) von MecklenburgとAdelaideの息子として生まれた。約1200年にKristina Sverkersdotterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1226年6月5日にドイツフレイスタアト メックレンブルグ-スチウエリンスタト グuストローで57歳で死去し，ドイツフレイスタアト メックレンブルグ-スチウエリンスタト ドバーアンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg(은)는 대략 1170년 그로ss헤어즈그투 클렌버그-슈워인 스타드트 슈워인에서 Heinrich Burwin (I.) von Mecklenburg(와)과 Adelaide의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1200년 Kristina Sverkersdotter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1226년 6월 5일 독일 프레이스타앳 클렌버그-슈워인 스타드트 그u스트로에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 프레이스타앳 클렌버그-슈워인 스타드트 도베란에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg nasceu aproximadamente 1170, em Stadt Schwerin, Großherzogtum Mecklenburg-Schwerin filho de Heinrich Burwin (I.) von Mecklenburg e Adelaide. Ele casou-se com Kristina Sverkersdotter aproximadamente 1200. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de junho de 1226, em Stadt Güstrow, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Alemanha, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Stadt Doberan, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg родился около 1170 г. в местности стадт щвирин, гроssхирзогтум меккленбург-щвирин. Его родителей звали Heinrich Burwin (I.) von Mecklenburg и Adelaide. Он женился на женщине по имени Kristina Sverkersdotter около 1200 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 5 июня 1226 г. в местности стадт гuстроу, фристаат меккленбург-щвирин, Германия в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности стадт добиран, фристаат меккленбург-щвирин, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg nació aproximadamente 1170, en Stadt Schwerin, Großherzogtum Mecklenburg-Schwerin como hijo de Heinrich Burwin (I.) von Mecklenburg y Adelaide. Se casó con Kristina Sverkersdotter aproximadamente 1200. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 5 de junio de 1226, en Stadt Güstrow, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Alemania, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Stadt Doberan, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Alemania.
